== Notes for [[Item:Q90246|Q90246]] ==

Julia bore Bassus a daughter called Julia Quadratilla (b. ca 100). She married to Gaius Julius Lupus Titus Vibius Varus Laevillus (ca 95 - aft. 132), Quaestor in Asia in 132

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaius_Julius_Quadratus_Bassus
--------------------
Julia Quadratilla BASSA-[57213],2,7,8,9,43 daughter of Caius Julius Quadratus BASSUS Proconsul Of Asia -[57240] and Julia, Princess Of CILICIA -[57214], was born about 100 and died. Julia married Caius Iulius Lupus T. Vibius Varus LAEVILLUS http://www.daveweaverfamily.com/dave/a66.htm#i57213

>>>______________

Wagner, Sir Anthony Richard; ‘Pedigree and Progress: Essays in the Genealogical Interpretation of History’

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
